---
title: "R & RStudio"
subtitle: "Books, tutorials, and notes for learning R and RStudio"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "rstudio/*.qmd"
  type: default
  image-align: left
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  sort: "date desc"
---
